sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines (DAL) Extends Suspension of Flights to Tel Aviv
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has extended its flight suspensions from Atlanta to Tel Aviv until November 30, with New York-JFK to Tel Aviv flights expected to resume on September 6. The company has a market capitalization of $43.51 billion and a GF Score of 84/100, indicating strong performance. However, there has been significant insider selling, totaling $57.5 million in shares over the past three months, which investors should consider alongside the company's profitability and financial strength ratings.

feed.title: Kroger Sued for False Advertising Over Misleading "Well Raised" and "No Antibiotics" Claims at Ralphs Stores in California
feed.summary: Animal Outlook has filed a lawsuit against The Kroger Company and Ralphs Grocery Company, alleging false advertising and unfair competition in California. The lawsuit claims that Ralphs stores use misleading "well raised" and "no antibiotics" signage above factory-farmed meat products that do not meet these claims, deceiving consumers about animal welfare and product quality. Animal Outlook seeks injunctive relief, corrective advertising, and legal fees to stop these deceptive practices.

feed.title: BofA raises Biogen stock price target on solid quarterly results
feed.summary: BofA Securities has increased its price target for Biogen Inc. to $203 from $200, maintaining a Neutral rating, following the company's strong first-quarter results that surpassed revenue and EPS estimates. The firm highlighted Biogen's solid execution and the durability of its legacy business, despite ongoing concerns about a near-term asset bridging the revenue gap. However, the stock is considered undervalued relative to its Fair Value, boasting a "GREAT" financial health score.

feed.title: PayPal Announces Strategic Reorganization to Accelerate Growth
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. announced a strategic reorganization of its business and executive leadership team to accelerate growth and streamline decision-making. The company will transition to a simplified three-business operating model: Checkout Solutions & PayPal, Consumer Financial Services & Venmo, and Payment Services & Crypto, along with several new leadership appointments. This restructuring aims to align the company's structure with its strategy to drive sustainable growth and value creation.

feed.title: eBay Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: eBay Inc. announced strong financial results for the first quarter of 2026, with revenue reaching $3.1 billion, up 19%, and Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) growing by 18% to $22.2 billion. The company reported GAAP diluted EPS of $1.12 and Non-GAAP diluted EPS of $1.66, returning $639 million to stockholders through share repurchases and dividends. Key business highlights include the planned acquisition of Depop, expansion of eBay Live, and significant growth in Focus Categories and C2C initiatives.

feed.title: Equinix Reports First-Quarter Results and Raises Full-Year Financial Outlook
feed.summary: Equinix reported strong first-quarter 2026 results with double-digit recurring revenue growth and improved margins, driven by demand for AI, cloud, and networking solutions. The company delivered its largest first-quarter annualized gross bookings in history and is raising its full-year financial outlook across key metrics. Equinix also highlighted business achievements, including the introduction of Equinix Fabric Intelligence and the Distributed AI Hub, and strengthened its position in the AI ecosystem.

feed.title: Amazon.com Announces First Quarter Results
feed.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) announced strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with net sales increasing 17% to $181.5 billion and net income rising to $30.3 billion. The company highlighted significant growth in AWS (up 28%), its chips business exceeding a $20 billion revenue run rate, and record unit growth in its Stores at 15%. Amazon's CEO, Andy Jassy, expressed optimism about various initiatives, including AI advancements, expanded delivery speeds, and new customer agreements across its segments.

feed.title: KLA Corporation Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
feed.summary: KLA Corporation announced strong financial results for its third quarter of fiscal year 2026, exceeding revenue and EPS guidance. The company reported total revenues of $3.415 billion, GAAP diluted EPS of $9.12, and non-GAAP diluted EPS of $9.40. KLA also increased its quarterly dividend to $2.30 per share and authorized an additional $7 billion for stock repurchases, highlighting confidence in its future growth, supported by its role in the AI ecosystem.

feed.title: Ford Reports First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Ford Motor Company has released its first-quarter 2026 financial results, which are available on the company's Investor Relations website. Management will host a conference call at 5 p.m. ET to discuss these results, with a webcast available for replay for approximately one week. The company also reiterates its commitment to its Ford+ plan and provides an overview of its global operations and business segments.

feed.title: Ford lifts outlook as CFO cites gains beyond tariff refunds
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. raised its annual guidance by $500 million, surpassing initial expectations due to anticipated tariff reimbursements and robust sales of higher-margin vehicles. CFO Sherry House highlighted that the increased outlook reflects not only the $1.3 billion tariff refund but also strong underlying business performance, improvements in product mix, and resilient pricing. Despite a $1 billion increase in commodity costs and some uncertainties from global events, Ford remains optimistic, driven by its internal combustion engine and commercial vehicle divisions, and strategic cost management.

feed.title: Citizens Financial Services Inc. (NASDAQ:CZFS) Short Interest Down 23.8% in April
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Services Inc. (NASDAQ:CZFS) experienced a 23.8% decrease in short interest in April, bringing the total to 38,050 shares, representing 0.8% of the stock. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with $2.16 EPS and $29.8 million in revenue, and maintains a "Buy" consensus analyst rating. CZFS shares traded down 3.6% to $64.81 and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.50 per share, resulting in an annualized yield of 3.1%.

feed.title: Traders Purchase Large Volume of Call Options on Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN)
feed.summary: Traders recently purchased a significantly higher volume of call options for Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN), indicating bullish sentiment as the stock rose 3.1%. The company's planned merger with Coterra is progressing, analyst price targets have been raised, and recent earnings slightly beat expectations, further supporting positive investor outlook. Devon Energy also offers a quarterly dividend and trades at a P/E ratio of 12.25.

feed.title: APA Corporation and Occidental Petroleum Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: APA Corporation and Occidental Petroleum stocks saw a jump in value after crude oil prices surged due to reports of a potential extended U.S. blockade of Iranian ports, pushing Brent crude to nearly $117 a barrel. The increase in commodity prices generally benefits oil and gas producers, making their stocks more appealing to investors, despite broader market uncertainty exacerbated by the UAE's departure from OPEC. APA Corporation's shares rose 3%, while Occidental Petroleum saw a 2.8% increase, highlighting the market's reaction to geopolitical developments in the energy sector.

feed.title: CWT: Proposed Rate Mechanisms Will Support Regulated Revenue Upside
feed.summary: The California Public Utilities Commission has proposed new rate mechanisms for California Water Service Group (CWT) that are expected to support regulated revenue growth over the next three years. Analysts have maintained a $52.00 price target, indicating a consistent view on the stock's long-term fundamentals. The proposed decision includes authorized rate changes and mechanisms to help the utility recover fixed costs regardless of water sales levels.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management holds 5.58% of Xcel Energy (NASDAQ: XEL)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a 5.58% stake in Xcel Energy (NASDAQ: XEL), holding 34,848,115 shares as of March 31, 2026. This ownership is disclosed in a Schedule 13G filing, indicating a passive investment with Vanguard exercising sole dispositive power over these shares and sole voting power for 71,640 shares. The filing clarifies that this is a routine disclosure for institutional investors and does not suggest activist intent.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management (VICI) holds 84.06M shares — 7.86% stake reported
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has reported a 7.86% beneficial ownership stake in VICI Properties Inc., holding 84.06 million shares as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made in a Schedule 13G SEC filing, indicating Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 110,691 shares. The filing states that these holdings are managed on behalf of various Vanguard funds and client accounts.

feed.title: AbbVie Earnings: Immunology Portfolio and Pipeline Look Solid
feed.summary: AbbVie reported strong Q1 results with 12% revenue growth and 8% adjusted EPS growth, leading management to raise full-year guidance. The company’s immunology drugs, Skyrizi and Rinvoq, continue to show robust double-digit growth, reassuring investors about their market strength. Despite the positive outlook, Morningstar is maintaining its $184 fair value estimate, noting shares are fairly valued, but future growth confidence is tied to the long-term patent protection and potential combination regimens for Skyrizi.

feed.title: Costco begins hiring as opening of Guilderland warehouse nears
feed.summary: Costco has started posting job listings for its new 163,000-square-foot warehouse in Guilderland, which is projected to open in August 2026 and employ over 150 people. The available positions range from cashiers and cake decorators to tire installers and pharmacy service clerks, with hourly wages typically between $20 and $33, and manager salaries up to nearly $200,000. Despite nearing completion, a Costco spokesperson stated it's company policy not to comment on new warehouses until two to three months before opening.

feed.title: There's A Lot To Like About Ameriprise Financial's (NYSE:AMP) Upcoming US$1.70 Dividend
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial (NYSE:AMP) will soon pay a US$1.70 dividend. The company's payout ratio is a low 16% of profits, suggesting the dividend is well-covered and sustainable. With earnings per share growing at 28% annually and dividends increasing by 9.1% over the last decade, Ameriprise Financial demonstrates strong financial health and a commitment to rewarding shareholders.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials (NYSE: VMC) boosts Q1 EPS as aggregates volumes and margins climb
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials (NYSE: VMC) reported a strong first quarter for 2026, with total revenues increasing 7% to $1,755.9 million and diluted EPS from continuing operations rising to $1.27. This growth was driven by higher aggregates volumes and pricing, which led to a 16% increase in gross profit and expanded margins. The company reiterated its full-year Adjusted EBITDA guidance of $2.4–$2.6 billion, citing a healthy backlog and public construction demand.

feed.title: ODFL Reports Improving Q1 Demand Despite Top-Line Decline
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) reported improving demand for its services in Q1 2026, despite a year-over-year decline in revenue and earnings, which still exceeded Wall Street expectations. CEO Marty Freeman highlighted positive tonnage growth in February and March, attributing it to customer service and fair pricing, and emphasized the company's strategic investments for future growth and market share expansion. The LTL carrier reported net income of $238.3 million on revenue of $1.34 billion, with LTL revenue declining 2.9% due to lower volumes partially offset by higher revenue per hundredweight.

feed.title: UPS Maintained by Citigroup -- Price Target Raised to $127
feed.summary: Citigroup has maintained a 'Buy' rating for United Parcel Service (UPS) and raised its price target from $118.00 to $127.00. GuruFocus indicates that UPS is currently undervalued by 21.2% with a GF Value™ of $134.01 against a current price of $105.60, and its GF Score™ of 79/100 suggests strong fundamentals.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage Q1 2026 slides: core FFO rises 2% amid expense pressure
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) reported first-quarter 2026 results that surpassed analyst expectations, with Core Funds From Operations (FFO) per diluted share rising 2.0% to $2.04. Despite this growth, the company faced increasing expense pressure, particularly from insurance and property operating costs, which outpaced revenue growth in its same-store portfolio. Management maintained its full-year 2026 Core FFO guidance, signaling confidence in its strategy while acknowledging ongoing margin challenges.

feed.title: Delta partners with Fox to bring sports and streaming onboard
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines has announced a new partnership with Fox One to bring the streaming service onboard its flights, ensuring passengers can enjoy sports and other content. This collaboration aims to enhance the in-flight entertainment experience for Delta's customers. The article notes this move as part of Delta's ongoing efforts to improve services for business fliers and passengers.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] REGENCY CENTERS CORP Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has filed a Schedule 13G for Regency Centers Corp (REG), disclosing beneficial ownership of 15,010,830 shares, which represents 8.19% of the company's Common Stock. This filing indicates a passive investment stance from Vanguard. The document details voting and dispositive powers, with Vanguard having sole dispositive power over all shares and limited sole voting power, and emphasizes that no other single person holds more than 5% interest.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Prologis (PLD) After A 42% One Year Surge?
feed.summary: Prologis (PLD) has seen a significant 42% surge in the past year, trading at approximately US$141.53. However, Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued. Both a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and a Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio comparison indicate that PLD is trading above its intrinsic value and sector peers.

feed.title: Medtronic PLC Stock (MDT) Moved Down by 3.14% on Apr 29: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Medtronic PLC (MDT) experienced a 3.14% stock decline on April 29, reaching a 52-week low. This downturn is attributed to negative analyst revisions, including price target cuts from Jefferies and UBS, and investor uncertainty following a recent cybersecurity incident. Despite positive developments regarding new surgical systems and clinical milestones, these factors were overshadowed, leading to bearish sentiment.

feed.title: FirstEnergy is in talk with prospective customers representing over 6 gigawatts of load in West Virginia - conf call
feed.summary: FirstEnergy is actively engaging with potential customers in West Virginia, discussing over 6 gigawatts of load, according to a recent conference call. This news follows FirstEnergy's Q1 2026 earnings call, where the company reported rising quarterly profits driven by higher rates and data-center demand. The utility company is also maintaining its full-year core EPS guidance.

feed.title: Shareholders of CNA (NYSE: CNA) approve pay plan and add 5M award shares
feed.summary: CNA Financial Corporation shareholders overwhelmingly approved key proposals at their 2026 annual meeting, including the election of all nominated directors and an advisory vote on executive compensation with 94% support. They also approved an amendment to the company's incentive compensation plan, adding 5 million shares for awards, and ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as independent registered public accountants for 2026, both with strong majorities. This indicates robust stockholder support for the company's governance, executive pay, equity incentive expansion, and audit firm.

(TPR), through a Schedule 13G SEC filing dated March 31, 2026. feed.title: Assessing Whether Gilead Sciences (GILD) Looks Undervalued After Recent Share Price Performance
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences (GILD) has seen strong long-term share price performance, despite recent short-term softening. The stock is currently trading at $129.26, which is significantly below its narrative fair value of $157.43, suggesting it is undervalued. This valuation is supported by the anticipated success of new product launches and an improved product mix, which are expected to drive higher gross margins and long-term earnings growth.

feed.title: A Look At Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Valuation As Hill’s Pet Nutrition Fuels Expected 2026 Earnings Growth
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) is drawing attention due to strong first-quarter 2026 revenue and EPS expectations, driven by consumer demand and advancements in Hill’s Pet Nutrition. Despite recent share price momentum, the stock is considered 11.4% undervalued with a fair value of $96.68, although its P/E ratio is higher than industry averages, suggesting less room for error. The company focuses on emerging markets, innovation, and productivity initiatives to sustain long-term growth.

feed.title: A Look At Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Returns
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) has seen significant share price returns recently, trading near its analyst price target at US$303.64. The company is currently considered about 1% overvalued by a narrative model, which focuses on earnings power and margin progression, while its P/E ratio presents a mixed picture. Investors are advised to review the underlying numbers and consider both the premium concerns and quality support before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management reports 7,886,489 ResMed shares (RMD)

feed.title: Community Trust Bancorp (CTBI) director adds 301 DRIP-acquired shares
feed.summary: James E. McGhee II, a director at Community Trust Bancorp (CTBI), reported acquiring 301 shares of common stock at $66.46 each on April 28, 2026. These shares were obtained through the company's Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRIP), increasing his direct holdings to 36,621.338 shares. The transaction, identified as a grant, award, or other acquisition, highlights an increase in insider holdings through dividend reinvestment rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Stifel Maintains BRP Inc(DOO.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $67.24
feed.summary: Stifel has reaffirmed its Buy rating on BRP Inc (DOO.US) but has lowered its target price for the company's stock to $67.24. This adjustment suggests a continued positive outlook on BRP Inc's potential despite the revised price target.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum sets June 10 payout for $1 dividend
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE: MPC) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.00 per share, payable on June 10, 2026. Shareholders of record by the close of business on May 20, 2026, will be eligible to receive this cash dividend. The company, headquartered in Findlay, Ohio, operates the largest refining system in the U.S.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) Shares Up 8.3% on Better-Than-Expected Earnings
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ:VRSK) saw its shares increase by 8.3% after reporting better-than-expected first-quarter earnings, with an EPS of $1.82 against an expected $1.74 and revenue of $782.6 million. The company also announced a raised quarterly dividend, a $2.5 billion share buyback program, and provided FY2026 guidance, though some analysts remain cautious about long-term growth and AI adoption concerns. Wall Street's consensus rating for VRSK is "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $237.20.
